summary: Complete testing of Return Order Workflow. Backend APIs 100% working (20/20 tests passed). Frontend UI is functional with all required components present. Minor UI issue: Submit button in return cart sheet can be outside viewport on smaller screens.

minor.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - unrelated to return workflow. get_dispatch_queue and get_pending_receive functions have dependency injection but called directly in dashboard route

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button at bottom of sheet can be outside viewport on desktop when sheet content is tall, making it difficult to click without scrolling

passed_tests: GET /api/returns/returnable-orders - Lists completed orders available for return
GET /api/returns/returnable-orders pagination and search
GET /api/returns/order/{order_id}/returnable-items - Returns items with quantity_returnable
GET /api/returns/order/{order_id}/returnable-items - 404 for nonexistent order
GET /api/returns/order/{order_id}/returnable-items - Shows billing info
GET /api/returns/billing-adjustments - Lists all billing adjustments
GET /api/returns/billing-adjustments - Filter by billing_id
GET /api/returns/billing-adjustments - Filter by is_credit
GET /api/returns/billing/{billing_id}/effective-amount - Calculates effective amount
GET /api/returns/billing/{billing_id}/effective-amount - 404 for nonexistent
GET /api/returns/orders - Lists return orders with order_type=RETURN
POST /api/returns/create - Validates items required
POST /api/returns/create - Validates quantity doesn't exceed returnable
POST /api/returns/create - Creates return order successfully
POST /api/returns/create - Creates billing adjustment for returns
GET /api/return-reasons - Returns all 6 expected reasons
Billing Logic: Unpaid orders get RETURN_DEDUCTION adjustment
Billing Logic: Paid orders get RETURN_CREDIT adjustment
Billing Logic: Original billing not modified - adjustments are separate
Frontend: Orders page Returns tab shows return orders (3)
Frontend: CreateReturnPage shows returnable orders
Frontend: Order selection and item selection works
Frontend: Quantity +/- controls work
Frontend: Return cart shows Billing Adjustment notice
Frontend: Credit notice for paid orders
Frontend: Return reason dropdown with all options
Frontend: OrderDetailPage shows Create Return button for completed orders
Frontend: Return order detail shows Return Order indicator
Frontend: Return order detail shows View Original button
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix CreateReturnPage sheet height so submit button is always visible (minor UX improvement)
UNRELATED: Fix /api/dashboard 500 error - get_dispatch_queue and get_pending_receive need to be refactored for direct function calls
critical_code_review_comments: Return workflow implementation is solid with proper separation of concerns
Billing adjustments correctly track RETURN_CREDIT vs RETURN_DEDUCTION based on billing status
Original billing records are never modified - only adjustment records created
Return reasons match requirements: Unused, Wrong Item, Excess Quantity, Defective Item, Damaged Item, Other

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All UI elements present, minor viewport issue with submit button)

seed_data_creation: Created return order RET-20260315-0004 via curl for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Return Order Workflow is fully functional. Backend APIs all working. Frontend UI components all present. Existing return orders: RET-20260315-0001, RET-20260315-0002, RET-20260315-0003, RET-20260315-0004. Billing adjustments exist for all. Note: /api/dashboard has unrelated 500 error.

verified_requirements.predefined_return_reasons: Unused, Wrong Item, Excess Quantity, Defective Item, Damaged Item, Other - ALL PRESENT
verified_requirements.billing_adjustments_never_modify_origina: VERIFIED - Adjustments create separate BillingAdjustment records
verified_requirements.paid_orders_create_credit_adjustment: VERIFIED - Creates RETURN_CREDIT type with is_credit=true
verified_requirements.return_orders_visible_in_history: VERIFIED - Orders page has Returns tab showing return orders
